nodes.name: 黑翅鹟鵙
nodes.summary: 黑翅鹟鵙（Black-winged flycatcher-shrike，学名 Hemipus hirundinaceus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括沼泽，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林道路
nodes.summary: 森林道路是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黑翅鹟鵙，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 大巽他群岛
nodes.summary: 大巽他群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括喜馬拉雅中杜鵑、蓝喉蜂虎、大灰啄木鸟等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 马来半岛
nodes.summary: The Malay Peninsula is located in Mainland Southeast Asia.

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the Malay Peninsula and the Greater Sunda Islands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the Malay Peninsula and the Greater Sunda Islands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The black-winged flycatcher-shrike lives in the canopy of lowland forests and forest edges and along forest roads and streams, and it sometimes occurs in swamps, mangroves and secondary forest

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The black-winged flycatcher-shrike lives in the canopy of lowland forests and forest edges and along forest roads and streams, and it sometimes occurs in swamps, mangroves and secondary forest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The black-winged flycatcher-shrike lives in the canopy of lowland forests and forest edges and along forest roads and streams, and it sometimes occurs in swamps, mangroves and secondary forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The population is declining because of habitat loss, but not rapidly enough to make it vulnerable, so the IUCN has assessed it to be a least-concern species
